name: Namecheap
description: Namecheap is a domain registrar and DNS hosting provider. Use this API to search and register domains, manage DNS records, configure nameservers, manage SSL certificates, handle domain renewals, transfers, and WhoisGuard privacy protection.

auth.note: Requires ApiUser, ApiKey, UserName, and whitelisted ClientIp as query parameters on every request.

capabilities.name: dns_get_email_forwarding
capabilities.description: Get email forwarding settings for a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_get_hosts
capabilities.description: Retrieve all DNS host records (A, CNAME, MX, TXT, etc.) for a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_get_list
capabilities.description: Get the list of DNS servers associated with a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_set_custom
capabilities.description: Set a domain to use custom DNS nameservers.

capabilities.name: dns_set_default
capabilities.description: Set a domain to use Namecheap default DNS servers.

capabilities.name: dns_set_email_forwarding
capabilities.description: Set email forwarding rules for a domain.

capabilities.name: dns_set_hosts
capabilities.description: Set DNS host records for a domain. Replaces all existing records.

capabilities.name: domains_check
capabilities.description: Check if one or more domain names are available for registration.

capabilities.name: domains_create
capabilities.description: Register a new domain name with your Namecheap account.

capabilities.name: domains_get_contacts
capabilities.description: Get contact information (registrant, tech, admin, billing) for a domain.

capabilities.name: domains_get_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific domain including status and expiration.

capabilities.name: domains_get_registrar_lock
capabilities.description: Get the current registrar lock status for a domain.

capabilities.name: domains_get_tld_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of all supported TLDs with pricing details.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: List all domains in your Namecheap account with optional filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: domains_reactivate
capabilities.description: Reactivate an expired domain name.

capabilities.name: domains_renew
capabilities.description: Renew a domain name registration for additional years.

capabilities.name: domains_set_contacts
capabilities.description: Set contact information for a domain.

capabilities.name: domains_set_registrar_lock
capabilities.description: Set registrar lock status for a domain to prevent unauthorized transfers.

capabilities.name: ssl_activate
capabilities.description: Activate a purchased SSL certificate by submitting a CSR.

capabilities.name: ssl_create
capabilities.description: Purchase a new SSL certificate.

capabilities.name: ssl_edit_dcv_method
capabilities.description: Set the domain control validation method for an SSL certificate.

capabilities.name: ssl_get_info
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about an SSL certificate.

capabilities.name: ssl_list
capabilities.description: List all SSL certificates in your account.

capabilities.name: transfers_create
capabilities.description: Transfer a domain from another registrar to Namecheap.

capabilities.name: transfers_get_status
capabilities.description: Get the current status of a domain transfer.

capabilities.name: transfers_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of domain transfers with their statuses.

capabilities.name: transfers_update_status
capabilities.description: Update the status of a domain transfer.

capabilities.name: users_get_balances
capabilities.description: Get account balance and funds information.

capabilities.name: users_get_pricing
capabilities.description: Get pricing for domains and other products.

capabilities.name: whoisguard_disable
capabilities.description: Disable WhoisGuard privacy protection for a domain.

capabilities.name: whoisguard_enable
capabilities.description: Enable WhoisGuard privacy protection for a domain.

capabilities.name: whoisguard_list
capabilities.description: List all WhoisGuard privacy protection subscriptions.

capabilities.name: whoisguard_renew
capabilities.description: Renew a WhoisGuard privacy protection subscription.
